scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.coverage: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS='--conditions=development' vitest run --config ../../vitest.config.ts --project cli-model-switching --coverage --coverage.include=src/index.ts --coverage.thresholds.100 --coverage.thresholds.perFile
